questions.prompt: The equation 5G + 45R = 380 represents the total points a student earned by collecting G green tokens and R red tokens. How many more points is a red token worth than a green token?
questions.rationale: The coefficient of G is 5 and the coefficient of R is 45, so a red token is worth 45 − 5 = 40 more points than a green token.

questions.prompt: In the xy-plane, line k passes through the points (0, −5) and (1, −1). Which equation defines line k?
questions.rationale: The slope is (−1 − (−5)) / (1 − 0) = 4. The y-intercept is −5, so the equation is y = 4x − 5.

questions.prompt: In the xy-plane, line p has a slope of −5/3 and an x-intercept of (−6, 0). What is the y-coordinate of the y-intercept of line p?
questions.rationale: Using y = mx + b and the point (−6, 0): 0 = (−5/3)(−6) + b = 10 + b, so b = −10.

questions.prompt: Figures A and B are regular polygons. The sum of their perimeters is represented by the equation 3a + 6b = 63, where a and b are the number of sides of figures A and B, respectively. Which statement best interprets the meaning of 6 in this context?

choices.A: Each side of figure B has a length of 6 inches.
choices.B: The number of sides of figure B is 6.
choices.C: Each side of figure A has a length of 6 inches.
choices.D: The number of sides of figure A is 6.

questions.rationale: The coefficient 6 multiplies b, the number of sides of figure B, so it represents the length of each side of figure B in inches.

questions.prompt: A neighborhood has a 2-hectare park and a 35-hectare residential area with a total of 3,934 trees. The equation 2x + 35y = 3,934 represents this situation. What does x represent?

choices.A: The average number of trees per hectare in the park
choices.B: The average number of trees per hectare in the residential area
choices.C: The total number of trees in the park
choices.D: The total number of trees in the residential area

questions.rationale: Since 2 is the number of hectares in the park, x must represent the average number of trees per hectare in the park.

questions.prompt: In the xy-plane, line t passes through the points (0, 9) and (1, 17). Which equation defines line t?
questions.rationale: The slope is (17 − 9)/(1 − 0) = 8 and the y-intercept is 9, so the equation is y = 8x + 9.

questions.prompt: An artist paints and sells square tiles. The selling price P, in dollars, is a linear function of the side length s, in inches. The table shows that when s increases by 3, P increases by 10. Which equation defines the relationship?
questions.rationale: The slope is 10/3. Substituting a point from the table gives an intercept of −2, so P = (10/3)s − 2.

questions.prompt: If the graph of 27x + 33y = 297 is shifted down 5 units in the xy-plane, what is the y-intercept of the resulting graph?
questions.rationale: The original y-intercept is (0, 9). Shifting down 5 units gives (0, 4).

questions.prompt: What is the slope of the graph of y = (1/3)(29x + 10) + 5x?

A city is planning to build a rock retaining wall and a garden. Limestone weighs 120 lb/ft³ and basalt weighs 180 lb/ft³. If 330 pounds of granite will also be used and the total weight of all rocks is 1,000 pounds, which equation represents this situation?
questions.rationale: Subtracting the 330 pounds of granite leaves 670 pounds. Limestone contributes 120x and basalt contributes 180y, giving 120x + 180y = 670.
